title: Reformatting
description: Transformation process converting data from one format to another, including reorganization, relocation, or dropping of fields, using well-defined rules to preserve information integrity.

definitions.definition: Transformation process converting data from one format to another, including reorganization, relocation, or dropping of fields, using well-defined rules to preserve information integrity.
definitions.notes: Transformation: a Digital Migration in which there is an alteration to the Content Information or PDI of an Archival Information Package. For example, changing ASCII codes to UNICODE in a text document being preserved is a Transformation.
definitions.sources:
- [CEOS/WGISS/DSIG/GLOS](https://ceos.org/document_management/Working_Groups/WGISS/Interest_Groups/Data_Stewardship/White_Papers/EO-DataStewardshipGlossary.pdf)
